title: Bacterial DNA Isolation Miniprep Protocol
author: Magdalena M Julkowska
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.pendjde

steps.title: Spin 3ml of the overnight culture to pellet cells (1
steps.instruction: Spin 3ml of the overnight culture to pellet cells (1.5 ml per time) @13000 rpm for 5 min

steps.title: Add 250 ul of P1 solution...
steps.instruction: Add 250 ul of P1 solution + Rnase 5ul and vortex to resuspend the cells

steps.title: Add 250 ul of P2 solution and mix gently
steps.instruction: Add 250 ul of P2 solution and mix gently

steps.title: Add 350 ul of P3 solution and mix gently
steps.instruction: Add 350 ul of P3 solution and mix gently

steps.title: Spin @ the max speed for 10 min
steps.instruction: Spin @ the max speed for 10 min

steps.title: Take 750 ul of the supernatant...
steps.instruction: Take 750 ul of the supernatant and put in a new eppendorf tube. Add 750 ul of isopropanol

steps.title: Remove the supernatant
steps.instruction: Remove the supernatant. Wash with 80% EtOH

steps.title: Dry the pellet @ room temperature for 10 min
steps.instruction: Dry the pellet @ room temperature for 10 min. Remove the remaining EtOH

steps.title: Add 50 ul of sterile / MiliQ water
steps.instruction: Add 50 ul of sterile / MiliQ water

steps.title: Measure the DNA concentration using NanoDrop...
steps.instruction: Measure the DNA concentration using NanoDrop and store the DNA @ -20°C
